name: performing-orthonotone-polychoral-instrument
description: Guides agents through launching, playing, sculpting, and capturing performances with the Orthonotone polychoral instrument MVP. Use when generating music, soundscapes, or live demos from this repository.
capabilities: Guide stage setup with static server and browser configuration
Explain control surface mapping for lattice and timbre parameters
Describe gestural choreography with pointer, touch, and motion controls
Instruct on scene design with snapshots for instant recall
Detail tempo and groove engine with MIDI sync and sequencer patterns
Provide workflow for recording and sharing performance takes
author: Domusgpt
securitySummary: This skill is pure documentation for a WebGL/WebAudio musical synthesizer. No executable code, network calls, or file system operations exist. Static findings are false positives from the analyzer misinterpreting markdown documentation and metadata fields as security patterns. All 58 detected issues are dismissible.
valueStatement: Users need guidance to operate a complex WebGL and WebAudio synthesizer. This skill provides step-by-step instructions for stage setup, performance controls, scene design, and recording workflows for the Orthonotone polychoral instrument.
limitations: Skill contains documentation only; actual instrument must be served from repository
Does not generate audio files or modify instrument code directly
Requires external static server and Chromium-based browser for best results
Performance capture requires system-level screen recording tools

useCases.title: Live Performance Setup
useCases.description: Configure WebGL synthesizer, set up snapshots, and capture audio-visual performances for live shows.

useCases.title: Sonic Texture Creation
useCases.description: Sculpt timbres using lattice parameters and rotation velocities to generate unique soundscapes.

useCases.title: Audio Demo Generation
useCases.description: Generate audio demos using Claude or Claude Code by guiding the instrument through predefined states.

promptTemplates.title: Quick Start
promptTemplates.scenario: Set up instrument for first performance
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the Orthonotone skill to guide me through setting up the polychoral instrument. Start a static server and help me enable audio and adjust master volume.

promptTemplates.title: Scene Creation
promptTemplates.prompt: Walk me through creating a custom scene with high lattice density and slow rotation. I want to create an ambient drone texture.

promptTemplates.title: Performance Mode
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me perform using gestural controls. Show me how to use pointer drags with modifier keys to modulate the hypercube in real-time.

promptTemplates.title: Recording Workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Guide me through setting up snapshots for a performance setlist and help me document the settings so I can recreate the sounds later.

bestPractices: Use Chromium-based browsers for precise WebAudio timing
Document snapshot settings after performances for reproducibility
Test MIDI connections before live performances to ensure sync lock
antiPatterns: Performing without first enabling audio in the browser
Skipping volume checks before adjusting timbre parameters
Recording without queueing snapshots in performance order

faq.question: Which browsers work best with the Orthonotone instrument?
faq.answer: Chromium-based browsers provide the best WebAudio timing precision. Firefox works but may have slightly less consistent timing.

faq.question: What are the limits of the lattice parameters?
faq.answer: Dimension controls harmonic density, Morph affects shape morphing, Grid sets resolution, and Fidelity adjusts rendering quality. Extreme values may impact performance.

faq.question: Can I integrate external MIDI controllers?
faq.answer: Yes, the MIDI Bridge feature connects external controllers. Use MIDI Clock Follow to sync with external gear and verify Tempo Sync indicators.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: This skill only provides documentation. It does not access files, network, or execute code outside of its markdown content.

faq.question: Why is there no sound after enabling audio?
faq.answer: Check Master Volume is above zero and Status panel shows AudioContext 'Running'. Reload the page if context is stuck in 'Suspended' state.

faq.question: How does this compare to other music generation tools?
faq.answer: Unlike AI audio generators, the Orthonotone is a real-time synthesizer you control directly. It produces generative soundscapes through gesture rather than text prompts.
